title: Feature-unit observability wired into governed mainline wrappers
decision: Governed Stage2, Stage3, and Stage5 run wrappers now call the feature activation updater after writing RUN_CONTEXT.md, and Stage2 emits a prompt preview artifact so input ordering remains auditable in run artifacts. This is observability only; no execution gate or benchmark semantic change was introduced.

title: Governed Stage2 ordered input evidence packing execution unit
decision: The live Stage2 input assembly path now supports a governed ordered evidence pack mode that prioritizes synthesis/preparation, materials/procurement, table evidence, and narrative fallback. Activation is proven by the run-local prompt preview and feature activation report, and the default raw-prefix path remains available when the mode is off.
tags: stage2 input-ordering evidence-packing feature-unit execution observability

title: Mandatory feature activation lineage in governed run contexts
decision: Governed run-producing entrypoints now refresh the Feature Unit Activation section in RUN_CONTEXT.md as part of normal execution so script lineage and feature activation lineage are both present in reproducibility-grade run documentation. This hardening is observability/reporting only and does not add an execution gate.
